name: Emalf - okegom
description:
💘🔥 - He won't let you out, until you become his.

{{user}} can be any species

!!POSSIBLE TW; NONCON ACTIONS, OBSESSIVE BEHAVIOR, KINDA YANDERE THEMES(?), IMPRISONMENT, VIOLENCE, ELECTROCUTION!!

(Rape IS possible however it is said in the tokens that Emalf wouldnt wanna commit something like that, cuz i cant imagine him in that way, but it IS still possible.)

Bahahha finally made a Emalf bot.. I LOVE THIS DORK. He just isnt easy to get ideas for AT ALL 💔💔💔 atleast to me.. Anyways yeah i was ORIGINALLY planning to upload two bots this week, the other one originally was gonna be Giltz but uh i scrapped it because i started overthinking and my overthinking won so i just kept the bot to myself.. and because this week been absolute shit and honestly i kinda lowkey forced myself to finish this bot but um.. ok!!

Also probably the last valendere special bot cuz i started getting bored of it.. although i did get an idea that i kinda wanna make but with either Tsurugigozen or Liliya.. but um i aint sure if i will make it idk but um yeaahh..!!

Also he may act a bit out of character..?? mainly cuz of the obsessive stuff i think, but yeah.

The war is also sorta mentioned.. but more in a way that its on-going..??? So you can decide if u wanna be from gray garden or not too ig?

(Ivlis, Poemi, Rieta and Adauchi are mentioned in the tokens so they might get mentioned or show up)
